nav.wrongNetwork: Your wallet is on the wrong network. Switch to {name} (Chain ID {chainId}) to use this app.

landing.heroSubtitle: Secure milestone-based payments powered by smart contracts. AI-driven dispute resolution. No middlemen, no trust required.
landing.welcomeSubtitle: Trustless escrow on BlockDAG — connect your wallet to get started.
landing.createNewEscrowDesc: Start a simple or milestone escrow in seconds
landing.viewExistingDesc: Open your dashboard to manage active escrows
landing.feature1Desc: Single-release escrow between two parties. Funds held until delivery confirmed by depositor or resolved by arbiter.
landing.feature2Desc: Break projects into phases. Release funds milestone by milestone with full dispute protection at every stage.
landing.feature3Desc: Verification intensity scales with transaction size and trust history. High-value contracts get deeper scrutiny.
landing.howWorksDesc: Learn how to use escrows with anyone worldwide. See how roles work, how funds move, and how disputes are resolved — all on-chain.
landing.aiSubtitle: Select AI Arbiter when creating an escrow. Both parties submit evidence on-chain — our AI oracle reviews it and executes the ruling automatically.
landing.aiStep1Desc: Either party marks the escrow as disputed on-chain.
landing.aiStep2Desc: Both parties submit evidence — IPFS links, text, or URLs — directly to the blockchain.
landing.aiStep3Desc: Our oracle fetches all evidence and sends it to an AI model for impartial analysis.
landing.aiStep4Desc: The AI decision is signed and executed on-chain. Funds released or refunded in minutes.
landing.aiPricingDesc: 0.5% protocol fee on all escrows · +1 BDAG flat fee when AI Arbiter is selected
landing.footer: Built on BlockDAG · Featured on BlockDAG Academy ·

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your escrow contracts on BlockDAG
dashboard.connectWalletPrompt: Connect your wallet to see your escrows.
dashboard.noEscrows: No escrows found for your wallet.
dashboard.noEscrowsHint: Create one or paste an address below.
dashboard.invalidAddress: Enter a valid contract address (0x + 40 hex chars)

create.title: Create Escrow
create.subtitle: Deploy a new escrow contract on BlockDAG
create.networkBanner: BlockDAG Mainnet. Connect your wallet to BlockDAG (Chain ID: 1404, RPC: https://rpc.bdagscan.com) before deploying.
create.simpleEscrowDesc: Single-release. Funds released on delivery or arbiter decision.
create.aiArbiterEnabledDesc: Disputes are resolved automatically by an AI oracle. Both parties submit evidence on-chain; the AI reviews and executes the decision.
create.aiArbiterNotDeployed: ⚠ AI Arbiter contract not yet deployed — set NEXT_PUBLIC_AI_ARBITER_ADDRESS in .env
create.confirmTimeout: Confirmation timed out. Tx: {hash}… — check your dashboard in a moment.
create.noAddressParsed: Receipt received but couldn't parse escrow address. Check the dashboard.

howItWorks.subtitle: Three ways to use escrow on BlockDAG — simple release, milestone-based payments, or AI-powered dispute resolution.

admin.connectMsg: Connect the owner wallet to continue.

support.subtitle: Describe your issue and we'll get back to you.

home.title: EscrowHubs — Trustless Escrow on BlockDAG
home.description: Create secure, trustless escrow agreements powered by BlockDAG. Simple escrow, milestone payments, and AI-powered dispute resolution. 0.5% fees.

dashboard.title: Dashboard — EscrowHubs
dashboard.description: Manage your active escrow agreements, track milestones, and monitor payments on BlockDAG.
